director.name: 阿林·克拉姆利 Arin Crumley

introduction: A hopeful romantic tries to hold onto a failing relationship with her playful but detached boyfriend. A sexually-repressed hitchhiker on a quest for enlightenment finds love in a broken dreamer. The surreal, mind-altering setting of a week-long desert art event becomes the catalyst for the simultaneous creation of one romance and destruction of another reminding us there is beauty in both. Shot on-location in a stunning desert landscape, the film is an explosion of vibrant imagery and ideas, merging documentary with narrative and the authentic with the absurd to create an entirely unique cinematic experience that asks what is love? What is reality? And where the hell is the porta potty?
